capabilities.name: Native e-signature (capture + evidence)
capabilities.verify: Draw/type signature capture + evidence certificate (see 2026-07-05 verify).

capabilities.name: Auto-invoicing from contract
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. contracts.billing_* schedule columns + generate_contract_invoice() SECURITY DEFINER (service_role escape) + daily contract-billing-cron edge function (pg_cron 15 6 * * *) reuse the invoicing tables. invoices.contract_id links the generated invoice back. UI: /admin/contracts/:id → Billing & reminders tab (enable, amount, interval, next date, tax, terms; Generate invoice now button; Run billing sweep button).

capabilities.name: Milestone/obligation tracking
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. contract_obligations (description, due_date, status pending/met/overdue/waived, responsible, met_at/met_by) + contract_obligations_with_status view auto-flags overdue. mark_contract_obligation_status RPC (service_role escape). UI: /admin/contracts/:id → Obligations tab (add row, per-item status dropdown, overdue badge).

capabilities.name: Payment reminders
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. contracts.billing_reminder_offsets int[] (e.g. [-3, 7, 14] = 3 days before due, 7 & 14 days after) + billing_reminders_enabled toggle. contract-billing-cron reads contract-linked open invoices and sends via existing email-send function; log_contract_invoice_reminder() with UNIQUE(invoice_id, offset_days) makes retries idempotent. Per-contract policy edited in the Billing & reminders tab; manual 'Run billing sweep' button triggers the cron on demand.

capabilities.name: Obligation tracking
capabilities.verify: Covered by milestone_tracking above (same table contract_obligations + Obligations UI tab).
